# JShaner Ventures
> Precision AI integration, advanced search optimization, and technical blueprinting for scalable small business architecture.

## About
JShaner Ventures is a professional services firm specializing in Search Engine Optimization (SEO), Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), AI Integration, and Technical Training for small businesses. Founded by Jonathan Shaner, a US Army Airborne Infantry veteran (11B3P), Purple Heart recipient, and self-taught developer.

## Pages
- [Home](https://jshaner.ventures/) — Company overview, mission, and principal consultant bio
- [Services](https://jshaner.ventures/services) — Technical service vectors: SEO/AEO, AI Integration, Technical Training
- [Vault](https://jshaner.ventures/vault) — Operational asset repository: AI scripts, automation tools, and GovCon documentation
- [Authority](https://jshaner.ventures/authority) — Professional profile, credentials, and leadership foundation of Jonathan Shaner
- [Roadmap](https://jshaner.ventures/roadmap) — Strategic trajectory from military service through GovCon readiness
- [Free Audit](https://jshaner.ventures/free-audit) — Complimentary website SEO, AI visibility, and technical architecture audit
- [Contact](https://jshaner.ventures/contact) — Engagement intake form and direct contact channels

## Services
- Search Optimization (SEO/AEO): Schema markup, semantic HTML, LLM-targeted content structuring for machine-readable data
- AI Integration: Local LLM deployment, API-driven automations, workflow automation, and data sanitization
- Technical Training: Prompt engineering, digital hygiene, and AI tool adoption for business teams

## Founder
Jonathan Shaner — US Army Airborne Infantry Veteran (11B3P), two tours to Iraq, Purple Heart recipient, self-taught developer. Founder and Principal Consultant at JShaner Ventures.

## Contact
- Email: ops@jshaner.ventures
- Intake Form: https://jshaner.ventures/contact
